(刚出评分，后面会涨)

“平平无奇”大学生安靖与千金大小姐苏栀曦互换后两人的命运开始交织。
当苏栀曦以为安靖是个可怜人生出悲鸣。
可后来却发现对方父亲竟是……
……
变成男生不久的苏栀曦脑子里却总是有着一些奇怪的想法。
每天想方设法的怎么占安靖的便宜。
……
变成女生后的安靖与苏栀曦同住一个屋檐下，可她却总是担惊受怕。
生怕自己一不小心就被对方吃干抹净，而她却不能对对方做些什么。
报J举报对方强迫自己?
开什么玩笑！那是她以前的身体怎么能送去局子！
正因为有着这一念头，安靖对苏栀曦的流氓行为感到头疼。
学姐你不要刚变成男生就这么炫压抑啊！
救命啊！有下头男！还是长着她曾经脸的下头男！
安靖欲哭无泪，当一回女生让她无时无刻不在怀念从前。
苏栀曦：“我听说某个东西能美容，学弟要不要先帮我试验试验?”
安靖：???
可随着时间的推移和激素的发力……
安靖：有朝一日换回去，我一定要把自己遭受的加倍给学姐还回去！
可现实却不尽人意……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/894740609d601664b5497e70bbd4ab4e","author":"好吃柠檬","author_id":"","book_id":"7587410053360012312","book_name":"互换后，冰山校花有点炫压抑啊！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":519,"name":"大小姐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=519&name=大小姐&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":831,"name":"灵魂互换","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=831&name=灵魂互换&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7587410659550167576","read_count":"42358","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"472844"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.1","serial_count":"154","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,校花,单女主,大小姐,灵魂互换","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/75c0e50ea0d44547371aea28e15bf45c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779181159&x-signature=keCsOonuY0MlrRjzsK9C6TGa0%2FM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2286615432266391","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"144"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201659195DF7199D43FA6A7836CA"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读12小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"li
